listings.description: Property DescriptionTop Floor Apartment with Iconic Sydney ViewsOn the eastern side of Victoria Road, facing Renwick Street at the rear and with northeast outlooks to the water, city skyline and Sydney Harbour Bridge, this spacious modern apartment provides serene elevation with a private aspect and spectacular views. The apartment occupies a quiet top floor position in 'The Drummoyne', a prestigious security building featuring just 17 private residences, and combines sleek designer interiors with a generous terrace and balcony, secure parking and proximity to all the amenities Drummoyne has to offer. Located in the heart of the village close to shops and cafes, Harris Farm Markets, Church Street Laneway eateries and city buses, it's also just 750m from the Bay Run at Brett Park and 1.0km from Drummoyne Wharf for frequent ferries to Barangaroo and Circular Quay.- Intercom security, lift access and ducted r/c air conditioning throughout- Open living-dining and covered northeast terrace with amazing views- Views include Spectacle/Cockatoo Islands, city and northern skylines- Modern stone kitchen with s/steel appliances, gas and ample storage- Bedrooms have built-in wardrobes, ceiling fans and harbour views from balcony- Fully tiled rain shower ensuite and main bathroom, Euro-style laundry- Stylish floating floorboards to living areas and carpet in both bedrooms- Access via Renwick St to secure parking for two cars and storage cage- Generous visitor parking spaces, city buses footsteps from the building- 160m from Harris Farm Markets, 250m to Church St Laneway precinct- 750m Birkenhead Pt and Bay Run, 1.0km to Drummoyne Ferry WharfRead less

listings.description:
Tucked away and quietly positioned at the rear of the well-maintained 'Waterdale' complex, this spacious garden level residence offers a distinct sense of house-like living but with the low upkeep and convenience of an apartment. It features private level entry and includes both a courtyard area and large wraparound terrace for entertaining just footsteps from communal gardens and a residents' barbecue area. The apartment comes with a wide security car space and large adjoining lock-up storeroom, while a heated indoor swimming pool/spa, sauna and gymnasium further enhance the resort aspect. Situated on the 'city side' of Balmain near White Bay, the home is only 550m from the exciting future Metro precinct, and within 950m of city buses and the heart of Darling Street village.

- Solid brick and concrete construction with no common walls
- Living and dining areas open into the courtyard and terrace
- Gas kitchen with s/steel appliances including a dishwasher
- Two bedrooms providing built-ins and with terrace access
- Ensuite with bath and laundry separate to main bathroom
- Ducted reverse cycle air conditioning and  gas bayonet
- Floorboards to living areas and quality carpet in bedrooms
- Lifestyle amenities and basement car space with storeroom

outlook.basis: Garden-level with courtyard/terrace beside communal gardens; near-bayside but not elevated.

listings.description:
Experience resort-like living at the water's edge with this stylish modern apartment in exclusive 'Marina Cove', part of the prestigious Harbourside Balmain development by award winning architects Bates Smart.  Situated in a cul-de-sac street between Balmain Cove and Elkington Park, just 80m from Balmain West Ferry Wharf, the apartment occupies a first floor position and showcases sophisticated interiors with premium finishes and a sizeable terrace together creating seamless indoor/outdoor flow for private relaxation and entertaining. Featuring direct access to foreshore walks from within the complex, use of excellent facilities and within 850m of Balmain and Rozelle shops and cafes along Darling Street, it promises an idyllic lifestyle in one of the area's most picturesque waterfront settings.    

- Lift access, engineered oak floors, ducted r/c air conditioning 
- Open plan living wrapped in glass with generous alfresco area
- Gas kitchen has stone benchtops, integrated Miele appliances
- Two bedrooms providing built-ins plus ensuite to the master
- Flexibility of both a home office/guest area and a study space
- Chic modern bathroom and separate European-style laundry
- On-site management, basement car space and visitor parking
- Residents' foreshore garden, BBQ area, gymnasium and pool
- City buses at top of Elliott St, zoned for Rozelle Public School

Enjoying expansive outlooks across Blackwattle Bay extending toward the ANZAC Bridge and Jones Bay, this spacious, sun‑drenched apartment is positioned high within the tightly held McCafferys Tower at Jacksons Landing. Showcasing generous single‑level proportions, it delivers a wonderful sense of openness, privacy and relaxed harbourside living within this prestigious waterfront community.

- Open plan living and dining zone flowing seamlessly to a broad balcony with far‑reaching vistas
- Contemporary kitchen appointed with stone benchtops, quality gas appliances and excellent storage

- Oversized second bedroom enjoying outlooks and built‑in storage
- Internal laundry, ducted reverse‑cycle air conditioning throughout
- Secure car space, separate storage cage plus ample visitor parking
- Secure building with level lift access and video security intercom
- Exclusive facilities two indoor pools, two gyms, tennis courts spa and sauna

Set within the award-winning Jacksons Landing precinct, this residence is surrounded by lush gardens and moments from Pyrmont's vibrant café culture, The Star, Darling Square, Sydney Fish Market, light rail and the upcoming Metro Station. Just minutes to the CBD, yet worlds away in serenity, Residence 1306 is the ultimate haven for those seeking prestige, privacy and perfection.

Perfectly positioned in the heart of the action, this sun-drenched top-floor apartment offers a lifestyle of convenience and comfort. With sweeping city skyline vistas from every room, this residence is ideal for professionals, investors, or students seeking proximity to Sydney's premier universities and attractions.

Property Highlights:
•	Unbeatable Location: Enjoy a pedestrian-friendly lifestyle just moments from Darling Harbour, the Sydney CBD, Broadway Shopping Centre, and the brand-new Fish Market precinct.
•	Stunning City Vistas: Wake up to breathtaking city views from the comfort of your bedroom and living area.
•	Top-Fill Living: Positioned on the top floor, this unit is flooded with natural light and offers a peaceful, private retreat.
•	Convenient Layout: Featuring 2 generously sized bedrooms with built-in robes, 2 modern bathrooms (including an ensuite), and a secure car space.
•	Proximity to Education: A short stroll to the University of Sydney (USYD) and University of Technology Sydney (UTS).
•	Outdoor Recreation: Step out to Wentworth Park, featuring children's playgrounds and expansive sports fields, right on your doorstep.

Ideal For: First-home buyers, city workers, and investors looking for a high-yield asset in a prime location.

A sunlit peninsula sanctuary with panoramic northerly views over Rozelle Bay, this bayside apartment captures the essence of relaxed harbourside living on the shores of Blackwattle Bay. Positioned on the top floor of a tightly held security building at the prized northern end of Glebe Point, the two-bedroom residence is bathed in natural light with a sweeping outlook to the Anzac Bridge that transforms into a dazzling night-time vista. Freshly updated interiors offer a sense of ease and comfort, with generous proportions and a layout designed to maximise light and outlook. A rare highlight is the oversized double lock-up garage with plentiful storage space, an invaluable asset in this tightly held enclave. Enjoy the best of lifestyle and convenience, with Bicentennial Park leading to Jubilee Park light rail and the Tramsheds dining precinct just 650m away, or stroll 450m through award-winning waterfront parkland to Blackwattle Bay Wharf and along the foreshore to the new world-class Sydney Fish Market.

- Top floor of Creebank, a well-maintained security block
- North facing with sweeping water views over Anzac Bridge
- Clean lines, roomy interiors, entry hall with built-in storage
- 2 bedrooms, king-sized main with built-ins and water views
- Spacious living and sun-filled dining, north-facing balcony 
- Modern stone-topped gas kitchen overlooking Rozelle Bay
- Renovated bathroom with a bath and stone-topped vanity 
- Separate internal laundry with storage, reverse cycle air 
- 31sqm approx tandem double garage with a storage area 
- 300m to Glebe Point Diner, stroll to scenic waterfront parkland
- 650m to Jubilee Park Light Rail and 800m to Tramsheds 
- Rates: Water $185pq, Council $264pq, Strata $1643pq (All approx.)

Recently refreshed throughout and set moments from the harbour foreshore, parks and dining precincts, this is a superb opportunity to secure a unique home on Pyrmont's highly sought‑after northern peninsula.

Overlooking the lush expanse of Wentworth Park, just moments from the CBD, this bright and sunny, contemporary two-bedroom apartment distills the essence of convenience, luxury and vibrant city living. Located on the sub-penthouse level of the prestigious, multi-award winning Mezzo complex by renowned Chrofi and Kannfinch architects, the apartment exudes a charming and inviting ambience.

Defined by sleek lines, high-quality appliances, bespoke fittings, and stylish timber finishes, the apartment has a uniquely alluring quality. The open-plan living, dining and kitchen area flows through large, retractable doors onto a north-facing entertainer's balcony overlooking the verdant greenery below, with city skyline views.

The gourmet kitchen features timeless stone benchtops and integrated premium Miele appliances, designed for effortless workflow without compromising on style. Both bedrooms are bathed in the morning sunlight, and feature ample built-in wardrobes. There are two elegant bathrooms, each with mosaic tiles and contemporary designer finishes that create a sense of style and luxury.

The apartment offers immediate access to a vibrant village café culture, with some of Sydney's best eateries just minutes from the front door. The Sydney CBD, Chinatown, the Fish Markets and Broadway shopping centre are all just moments away. With immediate access to Sydney University, the University of Technology (UTS), Notre Dame University and a range of top schools, this magnificent abode enjoys unrivalled convenience. It is sure to be equally appealing to the professional couple or the astute investor seeking to maximise returns.

- Bright and airy with large windows and inviting ambience
- Two generous carpeted bedrooms, both with built-ins, master with ensuite
